description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, set on a rectangular plot with a driveway and landscaped yard. The exterior features a combination of smooth concrete or stucco walls, large windows, and wooden accent elements, particularly near the entryway and patio areas. The front facade is defined by a solid perimeter wall with a gate, providing privacy from the street, while the rear and side yards are partially enclosed by fencing and greenery. The house includes a garage, visible from the street, and a covered patio or deck area at the back, likely for outdoor living. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, enhancing curb appeal and providing shade. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and functional, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, smooth walls, large windows, and a private yard, featuring a garage and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, solid perimeter wall, and street-facing facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, garage entrance, and landscaped side yard with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, covered patio or deck, and additional windows for natural light.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, secondary entry points, and more of the fenced yard and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a solid door set into a recessed wall, with a small overhang and adjacent privacy wall, complemented by minimal steps and clean lines.
